characters.appearance: Young woman with long blonde hair, fair complexion, and dark eye makeup. She has a slender build.
characters.wardrobe: Dark grey t-shirt with a graphic print featuring a skeleton and red text. She wears a white smartwatch on her left wrist.
characters.demeanor: Focused and engaged, occasionally smiling or looking thoughtful as she interacts with the app.

characters.appearance: Animated female character with red hair and a friendly expression.
characters.wardrobe: Not fully visible, but appears to be wearing a light-colored top.

scenes.supernova_script:
Character A says: English बोलना बहुत मुश्किल लगता है। [Speaking English feels very difficult.]
Character B says: What's your name? [What's your name?]
Character A says: My name is Nesly. [My name is Nesly.]
Character B says: How are you? [How are you?]
Character A says: Yes, I'm fine. [Yes, I'm fine.]
Character B says: Do you speak English? [Do you speak English?]
Character A says: Yes, I... [Yes, I...]
Character B says: Yes, I speak it. [Yes, I speak it.]
Character A says: Yes, I speak it. [Yes, I speak it.]
Character B says: How old are you? [How old are you?]
Character A says: I... twenty-four...? [I... twenty-four...?]
Character B says: I am 24. [I am 24.]
Character A says: I am 24. [I am 24.]
Character B says: You're welcome. [You're welcome.]
Character A says: मैं रोज़ English practice कैसे कर सकती हूँ? [How can I practice English every day?]
Character B says: Just download Supernova. [Just download Supernova.]
Character A says: मैं अभी Supernova download करती हूँ। [I'll download Supernova right now.]
scenes.scene_summary:
- Establishes the core problem: the user finds speaking English difficult.
- Demonstrates the interactive AI tutor correcting mistakes in real-time.
- Ends with a clear call to action to download the app.
